scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @builders/db && npm run build --workspace @builders/domain && npm run build --workspace @builders/lib && npm run build --workspace @builders/ui && npm run dev --workspace @builders/web
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build --workspace @builders/db && npm run build --workspace @builders/domain && npm run build --workspace @builders/lib && npm run build --workspace @builders/worker && npm run start --workspace @builders/worker
scripts.build: npm run guard:prisma && npm run build --workspace @builders/db && npm run build --workspace @builders/domain && npm run build --workspace @builders/lib && npm run build --workspace @builders/ui && npm run build --workspace @builders/web && npm run build --workspace @builders/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run guard:prisma && npm run typecheck --workspace @builders/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @builders/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @builders/lib && npm run typecheck --workspace @builders/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @builders/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @builders/worker
